title: Ordinance establishing the Balay Silangan Reformation Center (BSRC) of the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna providing general guidelines for the operation,adopting certain provisions of Dangerous drugs Board (DDB) Regulations No. 3 Series of 2016 and No. 3 Series of 2022, Sections 51, 77,84 (A) 84 (Q) of Republic Act No. 9165, and DILG Memorandum Circular No. 2009-09 Entitled "Unified Actions Against Illegal Drugs and Other Substances", and providing funds therefor.
